probe.title: Your server
probe.subtitle: Paste the server URL. We'll probe it and pick the right next step automatically.

login.title: Log in
login.subtitle: Sign in with your existing admin credentials.

bootstrap.title: Create the first admin
bootstrap.subtitle: Paste the first-admin secret from the server and pick admin credentials.
bootstrap.secretHint: Look for bootstrap.secret in the server's data directory (mode 0600, written on first boot). On Docker compose, run the command below — copy it to clipboard with the button on the right. You can delete the file once the first admin is created.

adminCreated.title: Admin created — welcome to Platypus
adminCreated.description: Delete <mono><data-dir>/bootstrap.secret</mono> on the server to keep the secret out of backups. The server also clears it on the next boot once a user exists.
